top_signals.title: Gulf-based firms set to reveal toll of Iran war in quarterly earnings
top_signals.summary: The fortunes of regional economies largely depend on how reliant they are on the Strait of Hormuz that provides the only sea access to the Gulf.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan shelves beefing up regulations for heated tobacco products
top_signals.summary: Some public health experts have advocated for tougher measures against heated tobacco products, saying the ministry should apply precautionary principles.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
